name: golang-golang-x-xerrors-dev
title: golang-golang-x-xerrors-dev
description:
new Go 1.13 error values
This package contains the transition packages for the new Go 1.13
error values.
.
Most of the functions and types in this package will be incorporated into the
standard library's errors package in Go 1.13; the behavior of this package's
Errorf function will be incorporated into the standard library's fmt.Errorf.
Use this package to get equivalent behavior in all supported Go versions.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-golang-x-xerrors-dev because new Go 1.13 error values.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-golang-x-xerrors-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-golang-x-xerrors-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-golang-x-xerrors-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
